zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford於大約1336年出生在英國斯塔福爾時，他的父親Sir Ralph Stafford36歲，母親Margaret de Audley27歲。他於1359年之前與Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP在英國結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1359年登記服兵役。他去世於1386年10月16日在希臘Δωδεκάνησα羅茲享年51歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾史東。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford于大约1336年出生在英国斯塔福爾时，他的父亲Sir Ralph Stafford36岁，母亲Margaret de Audley27岁。他于1359年之前与Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP在英国结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1359年登记服兵役。他去世于1386年10月16日在希腊Δωδεκάνησα羅茲享年51岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾史東。

nameMeanings.name: Stafford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name principally from Stafford (Staffordshire), but occasionally from other places with similar names, such as Stafford House in Ifield (Sussex), possibly East and West Stowford in East Down (Devon), and three minor places in Devon called Stafford, in Dolton, Broadhembury, and Colyton parishes. The places are all named with Old English ford ‘ford’ as the final element, but have different initial elements. The Staffordshire placename has Old English stæth ‘river bank, shore’; Stafford in Colyton (Devon) has Old English stān ‘stone, rock’; the Sussex placename has Old English stēor ‘steer, bullock’; East and West Stowford (Devon) have Old English stæf ‘staff, stave, rod’; Stafford in Dolton and Stafford in Broadhembury (Devon) may have Old English stæth, stān, or stæf.

variants.name: Stocker
meanings: German and Swiss German (also Stöcker): topographic name for someone living by a tree stump (see Stock 3) or an occupational name for a tree cutter, from Middle High German stocken ‘to clear land’.
German and Swiss German (also Stöcker); Dutch: occupational name from Middle High German, Middle Dutch stocker ‘jailer’.

English: occupational name from Middle English stokker ‘one who sells stockfish’ (fish dried in the air without salt). This was the usual source of the name in medieval London, where a bylaw of 1419 stated that no stokker should board a ship to buy fish (presumably in order to forestall the market).

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford was born about 1336, in Staffordshire, England, his father, Sir Ralph Stafford, was 36 and his mother, Margaret de Audley, was 27. He married Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP before 1359, in England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He registered for military service in 1359. He died on 16 October 1386, in Rhodes, Dodecanese, Greece, at the age of 51, and was buried in Stone, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford est né environ 1336, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Ralph Stafford, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Audley, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP avant 1359, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1359. Il est décédé le 16 octobre 1386, à Rhodes, Dodecanese, Grèce, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Stone, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford um 1336 in Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Ralph Stafford 36 und seine Mutter Margaret de Audley 27. Er hat vor 1359 in England Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er hat sich 1359 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 16. Oktober 1386 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Rhodes, Dodecanese, Griechenland und wurde in Stone, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford è nato il circa 1336 nel Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Ralph Stafford, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Audley, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP prima del 1359, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1359. Morì il 16 ottobre 1386, nel Rhodes, Dodecanese, Grecia, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Stone, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Staffordが約1336年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Staffordは36歳，母Margaret de Audleyは27歳であった。1359年以前にイギリスでPhiillipa de BEAUCHAMPと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1359年に兵役登録をした。彼は1386年10月16日にギリシャΔωδεκάνησαローズで51歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアストーンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford(이)가 대략 1336년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Ralph Stafford(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Audley(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1359년 이전 영국에서 Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1359년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1386년 10월 16일 그리스 Δωδεκάνησα 호데스에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스톤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford nasceu aproximadamente 1336, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Ralph Stafford, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Audley, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP antes 1359, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1359. Ele faleceu em 16 de outubro de 1386, em Rhodes, Dodecanese, Grécia, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Stone, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford родился около 1336 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Ralph Stafford было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Audley, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP перед 1359 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. В 1359 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 16 октября 1386 г. в местности родесь, Δωδεκάνησα, Греция в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности стоун, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford nació aproximadamente 1336, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Ralph Stafford, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Margaret de Audley, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP antes de 1359, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1359. Murió el 16 de octubre de 1386, en Rhodes, Dodecanese, Grecia, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Stone, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
